allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://bluereeftech.com/demo-next-js/graphql" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"query{pages\(where:{name:\\"about\\"}\){nodes{title aboutSection{aboutTitle pdfEmbedder videoEmbedder docEmbedder}}}}"}')
